headline: Public Storage: Why We Took A Large Position In The 6.6% Yielding, A-Rated, Preferreds
summary: PSA offers 14 preferred securities; Series F and another series stand out for attractive current yields, with PSA's common yielding close to 4%. Read the full analysis here.
